Author: Nainaiowo
Name: Better Deaths
Description: Records party deaths with pull grouping, fatal events, active statuses, and recent action timelines.
Changelog:
Death Replay beta is available with positions, overhead markers, zooming, panning, and DMU replay improvements.
Added Focused and Detailed review modes, plus a custom theme builder.
Death timeline width can now be resized.
Plugin distribution support was cleaned up.
